name: decisionai-mobile
description: Standalone iOS and Android shell for DecisionAI

scripts.mobile:prepare: npm run web:build && npm run web:copy
scripts.mobile:init: npx cap add ios && npx cap add android
scripts.mobile:sync: npm run mobile:prepare && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:sync && npx cap open android
